channel.title: TrackSpendZ Blog
channel.description: Latest personal finance, budget tracking, and FIRE calculation updates from TrackSpendZ.

item.title: How to Reach FIRE Early: A Step-by-Step Retirement Playbook
item.description: Learn the step-by-step framework to planning your path to financial independence and early retirement (FIRE).

item.title: Understanding Savings Rate: The Single Most Crucial Retirement Metric
item.description: Your savings rate determines how quickly you can retire. Discover how to calculate and optimize it.

item.title: Why Local-First Databases Offer the Ultimate Security for Your Financial Profile
item.description: Explore the benefits of keeping your sensitive financial data stored locally inside your browser using IndexedDB.
